top_signals.title: Hormuz Trade Will Take Months to Return Normal, Analysts Say
top_signals.summary: Oil markets have reacted with enthusiasm to an interim agreement between US and Iran which should reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore oil and gas flows — but that return to normality could be months away, analysts warn.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: French army shows Leclerc tank with once-mocked anti-drone cage
top_signals.summary: Once derided as primitive, roof-mounted armor variants have been adopted by both Russian and Ukrainian forces as drone threats proliferate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kesko to Buy Dahl Scandinavia Operations in Its Largest Deal
top_signals.summary: Finnish retailer Kesko Oyj agreed to buy building materials distributor Dahl’s operations in Sweden, Norway and Denmark from Cie. de Saint-Gobain SA for €1.2 billion ($1.4 billion) excluding debt.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK to ban social media for under-16s to 'give kids their childhood back'
top_signals.summary: The ban could include platforms like Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and X.

top_signals.title: Japan displays resilience in hard-fought stalemate with Netherlands
top_signals.summary: The 2-2 draw showed that even amid an injury crisis, the Samurai Blue can still trouble elite opponents.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Panel to consider expanding victims’ involvement in criminal proceedings
top_signals.summary: There is currently no legal provision allowing victims in Japan to participate in or observe pretrial procedures.
